stores.name: Jacquemus
stores.identity: High-end minimalist French luxury. Sun-drenched Mediterranean aesthetic. Architectural silhouettes, playful proportions, surreal minimalism. Simon Porte Jacquemus built the brand through storytelling and emotional warmth — unusual for luxury. Target: aspirational millennials and Gen Z with disposable income.

stores.name: Palace Skateboards
stores.identity: London streetwear and skate brand. Founded 2009 by Lev Tanju. Irreverent, deliberately ugly-funny graphics, deep UK skate culture roots. Collaborates with Reebok, Ralph Lauren, Oakley. Fiercely loyal community. Anti-hype hype brand — drops sell out in seconds but the brand actively trolls hype culture. Target: UK/global skate community, 16-28 streetwear obsessives.
